EventsHistory
This article is about the game system. For a list of Events encountered in the Hollow, see Hollow Codex.

Event

Type

Game Systems

Group

Events
Events in Zenless Zone Zero are limited time activities that give players rewards. Types of Events include:

  • In-Game - Access from inside the game, Game Rewards
  • Web - Access from Web Browser, Game Rewards
  • Check-In - Login Rewards
  • Mail - Mail Rewards
  • Social Media - Community Giveaways & Promotional Content
  • Fan Art - Art Submission
  • Prize - Merchandise Rewards

Contents

  • 1 List of Events
  • 2 Current
  • 3 Upcoming
  • 4 List of Event Types
  • 5 List of Recurring Events
  • 6 Other Languages
  • 7 Navigation

List of Events[]

See Event/History for a complete list of Events.

Current

EventDurationType(s)

ChaPanda × Zenless Zone Zero		September 26, 2025 – TBA Collaboration

Myriad Endgame		February 06, 2026 – July 29, 2026Threshold Simulation

Battle Trial: Tidal Wave		March 24, 2026 – TBA In-Game

Return to Ridu: Together in a New Chapter		June 06, 2026 – July 17, 2026Web, In-Game, Prize

The Final Callback 2026-06-17		June 17, 2026 – July 08, 2026In-Game, Audition Stage

All-New Program		June 17, 2026 – July 28, 2026In-Game

New Eridu City Fund		June 17, 2026 – July 28, 2026In-Game

Celestial Nexus Intelligence Dossier		June 17, 2026 – July 29, 2026In-Game

Bangbang! The Genius and the Miracle Chip		June 17, 2026 – July 29, 2026In-Game

Gleaming Shadow Team Battle		June 19, 2026 – July 13, 2026In-Game

Shiyu Defense: Critical Node		June 26, 2026 – July 10, 2026Critical Node

Assemble! Mock Exam Comeback Plan		June 26, 2026 – July 27, 2026In-Game

Advanced Bounty: Area Patrol		July 02, 2026 – July 07, 2026In-Game

Deadly Assault		July 03, 2026 – July 17, 2026Deadly Assault

Tales of the Hobbling Crow		July 03, 2026 – July 20, 2026In-Game

List of Event Types[]

There are 15 types of Events:

  • Arcade Event
  • Collaboration Event
  • Combat Bangboo Certification Event
  • Fan Art Event
  • Flagship Events
  • In-Game Event
  • Permanent Event
  • Photography Event
  • Pre-Registration Event
  • Recommendation Event
  • Social Media Event
  • Special Visitor Event
  • TV Schedule
  • Virtual Battle Event
  • Web Event

List of Recurring Events[]

There are 17 types of Recurring Events:

  • 141 Event
  • Advanced Bounty: Area Patrol
  • Advanced Bounty: Routine Cleanup
  • All-New Program
  • Breaded Belief Event
  • Check-In Event
  • Combat Bangboo Certification Event
  • Data Bounty: Combat Simulation
  • Double Drops Event
  • New Eridu City Fund
  • Potential Hypothesis
  • Shiyu Defense/Critical Node
  • Surprises Are on the Way
  • The Final Callback
  • Threshold Simulation/Hard Mode
  • Vicious Dogs Within
  • Z·Z·Z Beta Giveaway
